The '''Choi''' were [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Choi]]. A Choi named [[Susejo]] was eaten by the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and talked with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] when he was trapped there. This Choi unintentionally helped Fett escape.<ref name="A Barve Like That"></ref>
